vulnerabilities.title: Missing X-Frame-Options Header
vulnerabilities.desc: Clickjacking protection missing. Site can be embedded in malicious iframes.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add 'X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN' to web server config.

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy (CSP)
vulnerabilities.desc: XSS mitigation missing. Malicious scripts can execute in user browsers.
